text-1: Ye letter aap ko is leya bheja gya ha q k aap ny Bitcoin withdraw krny k liye request kiya ha isliye aapko neechay bataye gai documents bhejna hongay verification pass krny k liye. Aapko ye documents bhejny hain:
item-1: 1) Identity ka Saboot (ID Card, Passport ya phir Driving Licencse);
item-2: 2) Bank Card (ya phir Cards) ke copy jo aapny deposit krny k liye istemal ke thee (Card ke front side py sirf pehly 6 aur akhri 4 digits nazar aanay chahiye. Aur card ke back per kripiye sign kr dijiye aur CVV code ko chupaa lijiye).
text-2: Kripiya ye note kijiye k agar aapka withdrawal 6th February 2018 tk verify na ho ska to aapka Bitcoin withdrawal decline hojaye ga. Aapke Bitcoin position maujooda quotes k mutabiq close hojaye gi aur paisay aapke account balance mein add hojayein gai, deal opening ke commssion lagny k baad.
text-3: Agar aap aur kuch janana chahain to support team sy email ke zariye sampark kijiye:
